TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Congo,_the_republic_of_the, title = Congo,_the_republic_of_the, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Congo,_the_republic_of_the} }

S.FORM: Republic of the Congo hya' ga cyux maki' tay 1 00 S, 15 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 342,000 sq km (maki' tay 64ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 341,500 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 500 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 4,852,412. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 31.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 65.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 3.30%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Brazzaville. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 15 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Denis Sassou Nguesso, aring ryax 25 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1997 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Republic of the Congo hya' ga cyux maki' tay 1 00 S, 15 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 342,000 sq km (maki' tay 64ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 341,500 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 500 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 4,852,412. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 31.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 65.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 3.30%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Brazzaville. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 15 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Denis Sassou Nguesso, aring ryax 25 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1997 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: repuő≤li ¶~ ® o* tńße ¶~ ®oŇčo ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** s~…ē, ** ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a *.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ő≤razza*ille. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *enis~…ē s~…ēas~…ēs~…ēou Ňčues~…ēs~…ēo, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
